reviews.review_description: Thank you, thank you for uploading this app.  Months of being cooped up is taking its toll and it is so lovely to be able to "travel" to all these beautiful locales.  The films are so clear and vivid I feel like I am really there.  I hope one day to be able to travel to one of these beautiful countries.  But in the mean time, I can make believe I am there.  :)

developer_response.body: Thank you Sally. Happy to hear you enjoy our app. Best of luck! Team VR Gorilla
